source_content: Example Industries reported consolidated revenue of INR 1,200 crore for FY26, up 12% year-on-year. EBITDA margin improved to 18.4%. The board approved capex of INR 450 crore over two years for expansion in Gujarat.

articles.claude: Example Industries posted FY26 revenue of Rs 1,200 crore, a 12% YoY rise. EBITDA margin reached 18.4%, and the board cleared Rs 450 crore in two-year capex for Gujarat expansion.
articles.artham: Example Industries said revenue hit 1.2 billion with 12% growth. EBITDA improved, and expansion spending was approved for Gujarat.
